sequence: 博览会闭幕式两周前
撒丁帝国·大教堂

预兆.say: 无风的房间中，烛火却摇曳着。
就好似这个明暗不定的世界。
看来，情报是正确无误的…………
这一刻……我已经等得太久。
完成我伟业的最后一块拼图，终于要来了！
「实现一切事的日子快要到了」
马可波罗大笑着离开了。
风沿着敞开的门席卷而入，吹灭了最后一株正在挣扎的烛火。

sequence: >>R：你怎么看会议的结果？
>>C：给了铁血这么大的甜头，它一定会要求更多。
>>C：铁血迟早要动手。
>>R：我也是这么想的。
>>R：不过问题在于……何时，何地，以何种方式？
>>C：还不清楚，我会加强情报收集工作的。
>>R：你怎么看会议的结果？
>>R：皇家那边呢，回去之后有什么动作么？
>>C：你是指在发表了“赢得一代人和平”的宣言之后？
>>R：……皇家暗中与铁血结盟了。
>>R：应该不会有这样的展开吧……？
>>C：倒是没有收到过类似的情报呢。
>>C：皇家也许只是在观望。
>>R：那必须让她们尽快行动起来。
>>R：记得接下来有一个皇家的访问团，就从这里着手吧——

预兆.say: 黑色的太阳，正静静燃烧着。
好像不小心睡过去了，然后做了个噩梦……
我稍微清醒下就好，你来是有什么事么？
嗯，我有重要情况要向您汇报。
刚刚……我收到了克莱蒙梭大人发来消息。
审判庭认为现在时机已经成熟，是时候带您去取回鸢尾的正统了。
冠冕，只是一个象征而已。
因为人民认可，它才具有代表正统的意义。
不过我也并非心中毫无波澜……
身在维希的审判庭选择将圣座冠冕交予我手，本身就是人心变化的证明……
接下来我们要回马耳他么？
你之前好像提到过，通向冠冕藏匿地的钥匙就在那里。
因为此前圣堂的事，计划有变，我们换另一条路去。
——圣赫勒拿岛，过去的皇家“盟友”作为友谊象征借给我们的海外基地。
岛上有一座审判庭的秘密要塞，冠冕正在那里被马赛曲保护着。
嗯~虽然对外公布马赛曲已经沉没了，不过她其实一直和冠冕一起躲在圣赫勒拿岛。
刚刚我的噩梦就是关于马赛曲的。
黑日之下，她正在向我求救……
怎么会这样……难道冠冕的位置被其他人发现了？！
有办法立刻确认一下么？
不行……出于安全考虑，圣赫勒拿岛禁止对外收发任何信息，以维持无人值守的假象……
……克莱蒙梭大人或许是察觉到了什么，才会让我们现在去寻找冠冕。

sequence: 数年前
维希教廷·司令部
EP2-「流亡」

流亡.say: 嘈杂的指挥大厅，此刻却寂静无声。
通信器中传来的广播，正诉说着前线发生的事。
“凯比尔港的惨案已经给予了我们答案。”
“骄傲的圣教骑士不会和他们同流合污，骄傲的天之子民绝不会向淫威屈服。”
“前有狼，后有虎，现在是存亡的最后时刻。”
“勇敢的圣教骑士绝不低头，绝不成为任何人的傀儡！”
“以自由之名，我命令，陆间海全军舰队，就地自沉，就地自沉！”
少女坐在桌前失神地聆听着，直到大厅中再次陷入一片嘈杂。
那是已经许久未曾有过的，散发出疯狂的嘈杂。
教国的骑士团也，就此结束了……
铁血军队再次跨越了边界。
接下来，我们还有什么呢。
还有什么，能让教国免于再次到来的浩劫……
一阵突如其来的剧烈摇晃打断了少女的沉思。
……马赛曲，终于找到你了！
这里已经不再安全了，快跟我走！
走？
我不走。
圣座已经决定要再次投降了。
只是还没决定好要加入碧蓝航线还是并入铁血。
审判庭也要忙碌起来了吧？
为了把维希也变成不设防的城市……
你现在来找我做什么？
为了不让昨日重现，我带来了一个审判庭的提案。
……除了投降就是逃跑，教国的审判庭是从什么时候开始变成这样了呢。
我是不会逃跑的。
过去不会，现在不会，未来也不会。
你回去吧。
不是逃跑，而是带着使命离开这里！
我们还有最后的方案，必须要将鸢尾的希望之火传递出去。
这件事只能由你来做，马赛曲！
传递希望之火……？
你是指什么……？
审判庭一直以来不都是主和派的么……？
所以，这件事才只能交给你。守护冠冕是你的职责，没错吧？
带着「圣座冠冕」离开欧罗巴，越远越好。
冠冕是鸢尾正统的象征，决不能让任何人染指它一丝一毫。
……没错，守护冠冕是我的职责，就算要付出生命也在所不辞。
可是，审判庭无权命令我。没有圣座的命令——
你连死都不怕，还怕抗命么？！
腓德雷卡大帝进军的速度很快。根据她的行事风格，接下来只会出现一个结果。
——圣座，很快就要从世界上消失了。
现在只有审判庭有能力把你送出去。
没时间犹豫了，马赛曲，你必须立刻带着冠冕离开这里！
……我不相信克莱蒙梭，尤其是见识了她的所作所为之后。
但是……我相信你，霞飞。
……明白了，我接受这个提案。
未来有机会的话……再会。
…………再会。一路顺风。

sequence: 此刻
亚特兰蒂洋·某处
自由鸢尾主力舰队

流亡.say: 黎塞留大人，预计在一小时后，侦察机就可以抵达圣赫勒拿岛的上空了。
好，我知道了。舰队维持速度，继续全速前进。
遵命。
可怖，如果圣赫勒拿的要塞遭遇到袭击的话，能坚持多久？
坚持时间取决于遭遇敌人的类型。
圣赫勒拿要塞是审判庭建造的秘密避难所，主体全部隐藏在坚硬的山岩中，远离海岸。
其火力虽然不出色，不过拥有良好的防御能力。
如果想要利用武力正面强攻的话，至少要净化者一类的高阶塞壬亲自来一趟才有机会。
前提是它们知道对着哪里打。
我们在要塞隐蔽性上做了很多文章，光是找到确切位置就需要塞壬花费相当长的时间。
至少需要净化者级别的实力么……那我们还有及时赶到的希望。
黎塞留大人，侦察机在前方的海雾中发现了塞壬舰队。
其行进方向与我们相同，也许目的地也与我们一致。
嚯嚯嚯~说不定这是正好走到半路的进攻舰队，刚好被我们赶上了！！
也有可能是发现要塞过于坚固之后，塞壬派出的增援舰队……
不过这样也能证明，圣赫勒拿岛目前还没有被攻陷嘛！
等等，我在塞壬舰队中发现了代行者，数量在十台以上！
正在比对资料……
确定为代行者XV「Temptation」和代行者XV「Restriction」的混合编队！
这两个型号……根据白鹰之前提供的资料，是仲裁机关迪贝路的代行者。
可不是一个好现象……
黎塞留大人，塞壬舰队正在调整阵型，应该已经注意到我们的存在了。
看来我们没更好的选择了。
主动出击，消灭它们！

sequence: >>发出：情报显示，铁血正在向边境增兵，有发动全新军事行动的意图。
>>收件：了解，请继续收集情报。
>>————————
>>发出：情报显示，铁血的间谍网络进入了高度活跃状态。
>>发出：其电文分析显示，铁血正在为大型军事行动收集信息。
>>收件：了解，请继续收集情报。
>>————————
>>发出：情报显示，铁血参谋部正在制定进攻的详细方案，请尽快做好准备。
>>收件：了解，陆军正在巩固防线，确保万无一失。
>>————————
>>发出：情报部门截获了一份情报，注明为黄色方案。
>>审判庭判定其高度可信，请司令部立刻进行应对。
>>收件：了解，D计划正在准备中，皇家盟友将不日抵达，注意海上的动向。
>>收件：同时，为了行动顺利进行，请严格保密。

试探.say: 黎塞留大人！敌方舰队……全部消灭了！
果然不论什么型号的代行者都很难缠……
黎塞留大人，侦察机已抵达圣赫勒拿岛上空，很快就能返回结果。
希望我们不会到的太迟……
可怖，要塞有可能抗住代行者舰队的攻击么？
额……也许能坚持一段时间。
只要它们不决意把山头削平就行。
那肯定很快就会沦陷的。
根据以往仲裁者的战斗力来推测，移平圣赫勒拿岛对其来说并非不可能。
不过……我想不通塞壬为什么会对冠冕感兴趣。
虽然那是鸢尾正统的象征，但也不过只是一件文物而已。
我现在也没什么头绪……这件事之后再研究。
当务之急还是加快行进速度，救人要紧。
不管情况如何，我们早到一些，马赛曲可能遭遇的危险就小一些。

sequence: 数年前
亚特兰蒂洋
EP3-「故人」

故人.say: 少女在洋面上疾驰着。
不远处，是一片还在燃烧的钢铁废墟。
没想到会在这里遇上塞壬舰队……
看来这里不再安全了。
只能继续向西。
阿非利加大陆上，也许还有安全的地方……
少女向前方看去，放缓了速度。
此时，一个身影不知以何种方式躲过了少女的雷达，正静静地停在不远处。
好久不见，马赛曲。
真的是你么？！
自从凯比尔港的事之后，就一直没有你的消息，我还以为你已经……
已经阵亡了，或者选择在某个地方自沉了，是么。
嗯……近来发生的悲剧实在太多了。
你能平安无事真好，很高兴能在这里见到你。
……嗯，我也是。
消失的这段时间，我只是在执行审判庭的命令而已。
在凯比尔港之后，一直……？
嗯，一直。
因为要隐藏行踪，所以不能和你们联系。
好了，先不说我。
你正在寻找接下来避难的地方，没错吧？
嗯……这片区域已经不再安全了。接下来打算向西去……
不用担心，我已经找到一个好地方了。
你是要建议我去找黎塞留主教么？
如果是这样的话——
不是。
圣赫勒拿，那里有审判庭的隐秘据点，绝对安全——
我们就去那里吧。

sequence: 此刻
圣赫勒拿岛·周边海域
自由鸢尾主力舰队

故人.say: 此起彼伏的爆炸声在海域中回荡。
此刻，圣赫勒拿岛已经变为了一片火海。
呜哇哇……好惨……
塞壬这是……真的想要把山头夷平么？！
贝亚恩，岛屿情况如何？
岛屿周边的三分之二海域已被塞壬舰队占领，其中包括少量代行者。
同时，侦察机发现了数个还在运作的防御炮台，我们应该不算来的太迟。
……三分之二的海域？
没错。塞壬舰队似乎在岛屿外围空出了一个区域，原因不明。
也许是因为要塞过于坚固，所以塞壬只能选择集中火力？
毕竟前往这里支援的代行者舰队被我们消灭了嘛~
既然如此，我们就从塞壬空出来的海域进行突入吧！
……等等，不太对劲。
自从接近圣赫勒拿岛之后，有些事就不太对劲。
可怖……不，贝亚恩，你有没有感受到一种奇怪的气息？
……奇怪的气息？
对，和之前在圣堂中的感觉类似，这里似乎也有“污染”存在的“气息”。
抱歉，黎塞留大人，我什么都没感受到……
不过这里并不处于镜面海域内部，“污染”的概念应该不会存在吧。
我还不清楚……但是毫无疑问，塞壬的异常部署肯定和这股气息有关。
可怖，到了这里有办法跟马赛曲取得联络么？
正在尝试，通讯无法接通，不过我有办法用要塞内设备定位她的位置。
……还需要一些时间。
从周围残骸的数量上来看，就算防御系统全开也做不到这种程度。
她肯定是亲自出来迎击过……
早就告诉过她，一定要注意自己的安全……
这个笨蛋……
那我们就为你争取时间。
所有人，从我标注的位置发起攻击，吸引其注意力，为圣赫勒拿岛减轻压力。
咦？那个方向是塞壬舰队密集的方向欸！
没错。塞壬不想踏入的区域，我也不想进去。
在战斗中要格外留意那片区域的情况，我总有种不好的预感……

增援.say: 就在黎塞留一行和塞壬的舰队对峙时——
伴随着炮击声，两位不速之客如利刃般切入了敌人的阵线——
对嘛！这样才对嘛！
哈哈哈~真叫人尽兴啊~
……喂！你怎么先出手了！
哎嘿嘿……没忍住，抱歉啦~
你们两位……怎么会在这里？
啊咧——？
糟糕——看来我们暴露了，还是过去谈谈吧？
阿尔及利亚还有拉·加利索尼埃，真是好久不见了。
最近还好么？
嗯……黎塞留主教，自莫桑比克圣堂一战之后就没再见过呢。
还算好吧。
嗯嗯！我也还算……好？
拉·加利索尼埃，你平时不是挺能说的么，怎么现在僵住了？
……说话也得分时间和场合啊！
你看看现在这种场景……等等，可怖？！
你真的……是可怖！
你……没事啊…………真是太好了。
你失踪了那么久，我们一直以为你已经……
我的行踪居然到现在都没泄露出去么？
你们真的一直都……不知道？
不知道啊！真是的，怎么都不跟我们联系一下！
因为……我在执行审判庭的特殊任务。
可我们不是审判庭的同伴么！
就算是同在审判庭中，大家的任务互相保密不是很正常。
就跟我不知道为什么你们今天出现在这里一样。
你们，为什么来这里？
你们也看到现在圣赫勒拿的情况了。
不管你们来这里有什么目的，接下来总要先确保这里的安全才是吧。
说的有道理……阿尔及利亚，你怎么看？
唉，既然可怖特意带了黎塞留来这里，那她就不可能不知道这里隐藏的秘密。
隐瞒下去确实没有意义。
是这样的，审判庭下达了一项任务，要求我们前来圣赫勒拿回收圣座冠冕，并护送马赛曲返回本土。
果然……跟我们的目的一致。
（而且……审判庭的命令？偏偏在这个时候……？）
看来……之后的冲突不可避免了呢。
不对，你们要找冠冕和马赛曲，我们也要找冠冕和马赛曲。
我们明明是同一战线的。
……稍等，玩笑先暂停，我找到马赛曲的位置了。
……嗯？怎么会，在那里……？
贝亚恩！立刻让侦察机去我发你的位置！
重点搜寻山崖边，马赛曲应该就在那里！
……山崖边？
没错……我也不知道为什么马赛曲选择离开了山中的要塞将自己暴露出来。
等等，那个方向是……正好对着塞壬空出来的区域？
贝亚恩，行动小心。
明白。
黎塞留大人……我从现场，看到了一些奇怪的情况。
您之前的直觉，似乎是正确的。
那片区域现在正被红黑色雾气覆盖，就如同我们在圣堂中见到的“污染”一样。
而且在红黑色雾气中，似乎隐藏着什么敌人。
不光是在海面上，陆地上和半空中都是！马赛曲正在与那些东西战斗！
……似乎是指？你辨认不出敌人的类型么？
没错！我通过侦察机无法辨认敌人的类型……我还从来没见过这么诡异的敌人。
……随着雾气进入陆地的敌人。
看来这就是马赛曲没有固守要塞的原因了。
没想到避开了水面……还会出现这种敌人。
可怖，你对这些敌人有头绪么？
……完全没有，我从来没有听说过类似的东西存在。
……看来这就是塞壬选择避开那片区域的原因了。
……管不了那么多了。阿尔及利亚，还有拉·加利索尼埃，跟我们一起开辟出一条道路。
黎塞留大人，请你快去救马赛曲！
没时间争论了！
……好，就先这样。
嗯，救马赛曲要紧。大家也要注意安全，行动开始！

sequence: 数年前
鸢尾教国·首都
EP1-「破碎」

破碎.say: 在首都居民敬畏的注视中，黑红色的队伍正缓缓前行着。
这条在首都享有盛名的道路曾被用于纪念一场伟大的胜利。
现在，它被用于纪念另一场毫不留情的胜利。
几天后，教国覆灭的消息将随着刚刚洗好的照片，飘向这个世界的每一个角落。
观礼台上是……让·巴尔。
看来……骑士团也做出了决定，一切都要尘埃落定了。
……至少骑士团坚持了比审判庭更长的时间。
我是鸢尾教国的首席天使，不能质疑教廷的决定。
就算是放弃抵抗，留在城里见证教国的失败这样的命令。
我也不能质疑。
……就算是让我前往维希，见证教国的分裂这样的命令。
……我也不能质疑。
……因为我是鸢尾教国的首席天使，不能质疑教廷的决定。
我不能倒下，也不能逃离。
教国还需要我，这片土地还需要我……
因为我是鸢尾教国的首席天使……
……我不能倒下，也不能逃离。

sequence: 此刻
圣赫勒拿岛·要塞周边

破碎.say: 红黑色的雾气中，黎塞留向着目标艰难接近着。
这些到底是什么东西……
阻力越来越大，仿佛有实体一样……
仿佛要，窒息了……
力气正在流失……可恶！
雾气被炮火冲散了，不过转瞬间又再次聚拢。
一次次抵抗，一次次失败。
你现在做的事毫无意义。
放弃吧，姐姐。
让……巴尔？
不对，你不是让·巴尔……
让·巴尔绝对不会说出这种话！
你是幻象……和圣堂里的“污染”是一个东西。
要冷静……保持冷静，不能幻象被影响。
冷静？
你应该要做的是愤怒才对。
你抛弃了祖国，抛弃了同伴，抛弃了妹妹。
忍辱负重换来的是什么？
无尽的嘲讽，与唾骂。
你为什么要冷静？
——闭嘴！
嗯？生气了？
就是这种感觉，接受自己的愤怒吧！
黑色的太阳，正静静燃烧着。
什……么，又是这轮黑色的太阳……？！
转瞬即逝，黑色的太阳消失了。
黎塞留的意识重新回到了雾气之中。
但是——
……幻象消失了。
…………不适的感觉，也消失了。
同时，黎塞留意识到自己手中的旗帜也发生了变化。
光芒……正逐渐汇聚到旗帜上，就像曾经在圣堂中的情况一样。
信仰的象征与审判的象征……
……看来，连日不消的黑日也是你手笔了。
可你究竟是怎么做到的……
还有拉·加利索尼埃和审判型机甲的事……
你究竟在用圣堂做什么……！
远方传来的炮击声打断了黎塞留的思考。
马赛曲还在战斗……
趁着现在这股力量还在，救人要紧。
但是这件事……总有一天我会找你问清楚的。
……希望你能给我一个满意的答案。

sequence: 数年前
圣赫勒拿岛·审判庭要塞
EP4-「独行」

独行.say: 整体浏览了一遍，感觉如何？
没想到你们居然在山体里挖出了这么大的空间……
这座要塞并不在军事规划之内。圣座也没有特别批准过……
审判庭修建要塞的资金是哪里来的……？
这个嘛……大概用的是审判庭自己的资金？
具体我也不是很清楚。
不过在教国，审判庭的事也不用搞得那么清楚，不是么？
圣座一直觉得审判庭的权利有些过于膨胀了……
看来果然如此。
要是没有这份膨胀，你之后可是要露宿荒野了哦？
总之，要塞的控制权已经移交给你了。
我们就在这里分别吧。
哎？你不跟我一起待在这里吗？
嗯，我还有审判庭的任务要去做。
还有很多需要我去调查，我去见证的事……
你就藏在这里，守护好圣座冠冕。
等时机成熟的那一天，我会再来找你的。
明白了。守护冠冕是我的职责，我会不惜生命守护它。
马赛曲，如果有一天，冠冕和你的生命只能二选一的时候，我希望你能选择自己的生命。
……珍惜生命，鸢尾的血已经流得够多了。

sequence: 此刻
圣赫勒拿岛·要塞周边

独行.say: 异样的雾气遮蔽了月色。
它们扭曲着、抖动着，仿佛拥有某种意识一般。
仔细聆听，似乎还能听到无数混合在风声中的嘶啸声。
……这一天还是到来了。
觊觎冠冕的人，最终还是露出了獠牙。
敌人是无孔不入的鬼魅，坚固的要塞已为牢笼。
既然如此……那就正面迎敌，光荣一战吧。
抱歉，可怖……
我是鸢尾教国的首席天使。
在冠冕和我的生命只能二选一的时候，我将毫不犹豫选择冠冕。
不论陷入何种处境，不论面对何种敌人。
如果要对冠冕出手的话，就要先赢过我手里的剑。
……魑魅魍魉。
以鸢尾之名，放马过来吧！
长剑闪烁着刺目的圣洁之光。
少女守护冠冕的意志，仿佛转化为了源源不断的力量。
但敌人，是无穷无尽的。
压倒性的不利将少女一步步逼向悬崖。
终于，距离万丈深渊只有一步之遥。
…………要到此结束了么。
这时，少女终于注意到了远方的呼唤，还有依稀透出雾气的光。
那个声音是……黎塞留？
她怎么找到这里来的……
不……管不了这么多了。
少女手中的长剑再次嗡鸣起来，浩然的剑光将迷雾撕开了一道裂口。
少女看清了不远处旗帜下的那个身影。
黎塞留主教，保护冠冕！
保护冠冕————！
冠冕被抛向了光的方向。
少女的身影，也在这一刻消失在诡谲的雾气中———

sequence: >>我们的军队失败了
>>前线已经失守，铁血军队正在快速推进。
>>撒丁帝国也加入了战斗，局面不容乐观。
>>目前，各部队已根据圣座的要求……撤出首都。
>>以维持首都的不设防状态……
>>我已命令审判庭下属各部队服从这项保存实力的命令。
>>同时，情报机关将进入潜伏状态，做好长期战的准备。
>>包括所有审判庭舰队在内，所有舰队均已在让·巴尔的指挥下向各地转移。
>>不过，我已密令审判庭成员无需全盘听从让·巴尔与教国司令部的命令。
>>当其命令与审判庭命令有冲突时，以审判庭命令为准。
>>至于黎塞留……我会伪造让她出使皇家的命令，让她离开纷争的中心。
>>……如果洪水不可避免，就准备我们的方舟吧。

光.say: 在冠冕抛出去的瞬间，少女感觉世界也在嗡鸣中崩塌。
黑色的迷雾逐渐遮蔽了视线，所见的一切，连带着摇曳的意识，都坠进了这黑暗的潮水中。
好吵……
不过……很快就能安静下来了吧。
终于，要安静下来了……
少女放弃似地闭上了双眼，任凭意识逐渐远去。
但耳边，依稀传来了一个声音，熟悉又陌生的声音。
……保持……意识……
……不要……放弃……
光，出现了。
「于地狱之中涌现的邪恶。」
「由扭曲之中诞生的孽物。」
「吾乃鸢尾枢机主教黎塞留。」
「此处，为鸢尾之圣地。」
「吾绝不允许尔等在此肆意妄为。」
「尘归尘，土归土。」
「在神圣的旗帜下焚尽，然后消失吧！」
扭动的梦魇在光芒的灼烧下逐渐变得稀薄。
不久后，马赛曲感受到了温度的回归。
少女鼓起精神来，确认着周围的状况。
黎塞留主教正高举着旗帜，扭曲的敌人正在溃散……
但是…………似乎有什么不对。
马赛曲，你还好么？现在感觉怎么样？
黎塞留主教，冠冕……
被夺走了。
什么？！！
突如其来的巨大刺激击穿了维系理性的最后一根弦。
疲劳如洪水般涌来，少女的意识断线了。
……好好休息，接下来就交给我吧。
不久后，受伤的马赛曲被转移到了安全的地方。
而那些扭曲的骇人异物，在夺走了冠冕后也消散得无影无踪。
仿佛最初就不曾存在过一样。
唯有岛屿上燃烧着的废墟，诉说着这场战斗的艰辛与真实。

sequence: 一段时间后
圣赫勒拿岛·审判庭要塞
自由鸢尾舰队主力舰队&审判庭特别行动舰队

新的未来.say: 不得不说，审判庭的要塞修的就是坚固。
外面都打成这样了，里面居然没什么太大损害。
嘘，小声一点，病人还在休息。
啊抱歉，抱歉……
……你生气了？
……没有。
绝对生气了！
……是，但……没在生你气。
那就是在生我的气吧~？
黎塞留大人，辛苦了。
外面的情况怎么样？
岛屿的火已经灭的差不多了，也没有看到塞壬后续袭击的迹象。
看来圣座冠冕就是它们的目标。
…………而你让它们达成了目标！
为什么，黎塞留？
因为我做出了选择。
当时你处境艰险，我不能看着你在我面前牺牲。
我是鸢尾教国的天使，为了保护冠冕不惜性命是我的誓言！
但不是我的。
冠冕只是个「象征」而已。
也许它上面的确寄宿着力量，但这股力量却又来源于信仰这象征的人。
一个象征，怎么能与同伴的性命相提并论？
就算再来一次，我也会做出同样的选择。
我果然……不能理解你。
马赛曲闭上眼，干脆一言不发了。
唉……我们还是先出去吧，让她好好休息一下。
圣赫勒拿岛·近海
黎塞留卿。
嗯？怎么了。
接下来，我们必须立刻返回本土向克莱蒙梭大人汇报本次的情况。
审判庭将会着手展开对于失踪冠冕的追踪。
马赛曲……就拜托你了。
……果然你还是不打算留下来啊。
我有我的立场和使命在身，就此别过了，黎塞留卿。
你们谁都不许走！
我代表自由鸢尾海军向维希教廷所属之阿尔及利亚与拉·加利索尼埃发出通告！
此处为自由鸢尾所属领地及海域！
非法入侵至此，岂能让你们轻易离开？
你们已经被包围了，乖乖投降吧！
之前事情进展的太自然，不知不觉忘了这一茬了。
这下可糟了。阿尔及利亚，现在这种情况也没法突围了，投降吧。
反正任务已经失败了，回去也不好交代。
克莱蒙梭大人说只许成功不许失败，可没说不能投降啊~
………………可怖，还有拉·加利索尼埃，我明白你们演这一出的意思。
但是……
阿尔及利亚，这些年来你身在维希，对于祖国受到的压迫应该有切身体会才是。
我在海外的所行所为，你也应该全都看在眼里。
你心里应该清楚我所行之事是正确的，也是正义的。
而且不论前方是什么风暴在等待着，我都会昂首向前。
在达到目标前，我绝不会放弃。自由鸢尾也绝不会放弃。
我知道，克莱蒙梭和审判庭一直都没有放弃。
我们的人民也确实得到了脆弱的庇护。
但是这样真的就够了么？
虚伪的和平持续的同时，分裂的现实也开始固化了。
现在的局势你们应该很清楚。
战争几乎要停止了，碧蓝航线和赤色中轴仿佛又要亲如战友，甚至召开了世界博览会。
然后呢？我们呢？
没有人在意鸢尾是否统一。
有些人甚至就想让我们维持在分裂状态。
比如我们那正在眉来眼去的“忠诚”盟友和“阴险”敌人，不是么？
你们真的什么都没看到么？
还是说看到了，也无能为力，对么？
黎塞留卿，我……
单靠你们破解不了僵局的，加入自由鸢尾，与我们一同战斗吧。
但是，克莱蒙梭大人那边……
不用担心，她有能力照顾好自己。
而且我们很快就会一起去找她，一起让我们分裂的祖国合二为一。
你要是负隅顽抗的话，就只好请你在圣赫勒拿多“度假”一段时间了。
别忘了，你已经被“包围”了哦。
阿尔及利亚，投降吧。
我们会给予你加入自由鸢尾的许可，以及……与我们再度并肩作战的权利。
呼…………我明白了。
在这种处境和这样的条件下，我同意投降。
只是经历了这一切后，往日，已经永远也回不去了。
但是我们将会创造出一个新的未来。
嗯，让我们一同创造出比往日更加闪耀的未来吧，黎塞留卿。
欢迎回来，阿尔及利亚。

等待.say: 翌日，审判庭要塞中。
经过一夜的休息，众人正在会议室中商量着后续计划。
黎塞留，我们应该先去找冠冕。
冠冕必须被夺回，鸢尾教国的象征决不能落入他人手中。
这个我也支持。
黎塞留大人，如果没有冠冕的话，接下来的很多事就不好办了。
而且，那些未知敌人的身份总是要查清楚的。
嗯……如果可能的话，能夺回冠冕是最好的。
不过一时找不到也不用强求。
相比冠冕本身，查清楚冠冕吸引塞壬出手的原因更为重要。
那些奇怪的雾状敌人跟仲裁机关之间的关联也很有必要查清楚。
这样的话，要不要我先回去？
昨天这里发生的事除了我们之外肯定没人知道。
那我岂不是可以大摇大摆的回去当间谍，然后用审判庭的情报网好好调查一番？
这个方案倒是可以考虑，黎塞留卿，你怎么看？
嗯……如果是这样的话，还可以获取到更多关于本土现状的情报。
那就这么决定啦？我一会就动身起航，以免耽误时间太长报告不好编。
等等，拉·加利索尼埃，还有黎塞留大人。
圣赫勒拿岛上，除了有冠冕之外，还有很多审判庭的重要资产存放在这里。
这些资产一定会在后续行动中起到大作用。
不过要将它们都纳入自由鸢尾的掌控中，还需要花不少时间清点。
我认为在圣赫勒拿要塞恢复稳定正常运行之前，为了资产的安全，大家还是都留在这里比较好。
这么说的话确实也有道理……但也不用所有人都留在这里吧？
分头行动效率不是更高？
你觉得你成了间谍的事能骗得过克莱蒙梭大人么？
额……让我仔细盘算盘算……
黎塞留大人，刚刚提到的事我认为是十分有必要的。
这段时间，大家就留在圣赫勒拿岛上修整吧。
既然你强烈建议的话，我倒也觉得没什么不妥。
返回审判庭当间谍……细想一下确实有些草率了。
非常感谢，黎塞留大人。
对了，拉·加利索尼埃。
黎塞留主教前日或许受到了凯尔盖朗圣堂内设施的干扰，你那里的药分一点来。
药？
嗯，你的噩梦是在从圣堂回来之后陆续出现的，我感觉也许是因为在其中受到了某种影响。
审判庭时常在圣堂中行动，因此有消除其影响的药，也许会有帮助。
你等等啊，我确实带了一些。
拉·加利索尼埃翻找了一会，拿出来了一个密封严实的小药瓶。
找到了~给，如果是因为受到圣堂影响而导致不适的话，这样一小瓶就足够啦。
两瓶，也给我这里放一瓶。备用。
快点——
看着可怖伸出的手，拉·加利索尼埃犹豫了一下，最后还是又拿出一瓶药递给了可怖。
感谢。
那么——我继续去工作了。

sequence: >>“……我已经要求敌人停止所有敌意行为。”
>>“身为圣座，做出这个决定使我万分痛苦。”
>>“但是军事形势要求我必须如此……”
>>听到这段广播时，许多人都处在一种麻木状态中。
>>仿佛一切终于尘埃落定了一般。
>>这样很好，不然这段卑劣的宣言也就失去了意义。
>>也有人因为这样肮脏的交易而愤怒。
>>怒火充斥着胸膛，咒骂着做出这项决定的人。
>>这样也很好，愤怒将会孕育反抗的土壤。
>>鸢尾教国的战斗结束了。
>>但，我的战斗才刚刚开始。
Two weeks before the World Expo's closing
Sardegna Empire - Cathedral

The Omen.say: In the solemn stillness of the cathedral chamber, only a few faint, forlorn specks of candlelight parted the darkness.
The flickering shadows cast across the floor's tiles were as branches shivering in anticipation of a coming storm.
...The sign has been made manifest.
The clouds part...
...and a holy light spreads across this land.
I see... a symbol of the Divine's descent.
...A radiant embodiment of glory.
Then, I see...
Stop right there! You totally lost me, so let's back it up a bit.
You mentioned something about the "Divine's descent." In other words, the incarnation has finally appeared?
Magnificent! This confirms that my information is correct.
Ahahahaha!
Oh, how long I've waited for this day!
Finally, the last piece of the puzzle needed for my feat of strength has arrived–
Now... Come to me, "God"!
The day when all wishes shall be granted is coming.
Ahahaha! Ohohohoho!
Marco Polo's discordant laughter echoed through the halls as she turned to leave the cathedral.
The gust of wind that blew through the doors she threw open snuffed out the last candle.
...Then the clouds cover the skies once more.
...The world is enveloped in a false light.
...And so, it is born. "God's" eternal, hollow paradise on earth.

A black sun, quietly burning in the dusky sky.
...Not this again.
...Jean Bart, are you there?
Wait... You're not her...
You're... Marseillaise?
█▊▇I'm▅▁▂▋▄▊danger█▌
You're in danger?
█▆hurry▇█

█▆please▇█▂▁▅help█▎█
Cardinal?
Oh, Cardinaaal?
Cardinal Richelieu, are you alright?
Mm... My head still feels a bit heavy...
Forgive me. I must've dozed off.
But, I'll be fine. More importantly, did you have something to tell me?
Yes. Something very important, in fact.
Lady Clemenceau has sent you a message. I shall read it to you.
"The time has come for you to reclaim the Iris' Crown."

You don't seem particularly excited.
The Crown of the Holy See is the Orthodoxy's symbol, yes, but that is all it is – a symbol.
The Orthodoxy's true legitimacy comes from those who have faith in it.
Having said that, this message isn't at all meaningless.
The very fact that the Tribunal is willing to tell me about the Crown is proof that the winds of change are blowing.
And the key to the Crown lies in Malta.
If we want to seize this opportunity, that's where we should go.
That will not be necessary.
The situation has changed after your splendid retaking of the Basilica Isles. We are now able to sail directly to the Crown.
Really?
Yes. Our target is Saint Helena. The Tribunal established a secret stronghold on the island some time ago, with the Royal Navy's permission.
That is where we'll find the Crown, guarded by Marseillaise.
Wait... Marseillaise?
Indeed. Many assume she was stricken from the record, but she has actually been hiding on that island, protecting the Crown.
Le Terrible, I need to tell you something that you might not believe. I've been having recurring dreams...
And in the last one, I saw Marseillaise beneath a black sun, begging for help.
A black sun, you say?
That does seem like quite the ill omen, but I fear for what it means if it isn't.
At any rate, I'm concerned about Marseillaise's well-being. Can we get in touch with her?
I'm afraid not. The stronghold cannot send nor receive messages to maintain the illusion that it is uninhabited.
Perhaps Lady Clemenceau wants us to go there because she has sensed something is wrong...
Then let us set sail at once. To Saint Helena!

sequence: Years ago...
Vichya Dominion - Command Center
Marseillaise's recollection

Exodus.say: The command center, normally bustling with noise and activity at all times, had fallen silent.
That is, except for the voice of Jean Bart, shouting a report through her communicator.
"Remember what happened at Kébir! The Azur Lane already made their intentions clear to us..."
"The Vichya Dominion is surrounded by vultures ready to devour us. But what of it?"
"While I draw breath, I will never allow us to bow before such hypocrites!"
"The proud Templar Knights shall never bow their heads! So that we may never become puppets..."
"I hereby order all of you to sink!"
The girl sitting at the table listened to the speech absent-mindedly until the command center grew noisy once more.
It was a noise she had not heard in a very long time. What a terrible, cacophonous noise.
(The esteemed Templar Knights have fallen...)
(The Naval HQ has sent Iron Blood's forces into our territory once again...)
(The Reenactment has been carried out. What options do we have...?)
(What am I to do to protect the Orthodoxy?)
The girl was pulled out of her brooding by a voice calling out to her.
There you are, Marseillaise.
This facility is no longer safe. Please come with me.
Joffre? But, I...
I'm not going anywhere.
The Reenactment is complete. The Holy See will soon be occupied by someone else.
In this regard, I see little difference between the Azur Lane and the Crimson Axis.
Surely, the Tribunal won't sit around and watch this affair unfold from the sidelines...
(If the capital were to be left undefended, what would we do if the Sirens attacked?)
...By the way, Joffre, why are you here?
The Tribunal has decided to relocate the Crown.
We would like you to evacuate, and preserve your combat strength–
Evacuate...? The Tribunal, protectors of the Iris' sanctity, would have me flee without even putting up a fight?
I will not run, Joffre. I must see this Reenactment through to its conclusion.
I will not go back. Not now, not in the future. The Fighting Angel belongs only on the battlefield.
Go ahead and leave, Joffre. Don't worry about me.
Who said anything about "running away"?
The Crown of the Holy See is a symbol of the Orthodoxy. Its true legitimacy will be preserved as long as there are people who have faith in it.
And only you, Marseillaise, can carry out the sacred duty of protecting it.
This Crown... is it really that valuable?
Certainly, it's true that as long as people recognize the legitimacy of the Crown, there will be those who seek to claim it. But...
That being the case, why am I hearing this from the Tribunal?
...If the Templar Knights represent the Orthodoxy's light, then the Tribunal represents its darkness.
As you said, it is a self-evident truth that there will be those who seek to claim the Crown.
Therefore, as the Fighting Angel, it is your sacred duty to keep it from the hands of evildoers.
That's right... It is my duty to protect the Crown, even if it costs me my life.
But, the Tribunal has no right to order me around. I heed only the will of the Holy Iris–
What you heed is not the will of the Holy Iris, but rather the people who worship it.
Iron Blood's forces are fast approaching. Given the situation at hand, the Naval HQ can have only one objective in mind:
–The dissolution of the Iris Orthodoxy.
That is why the Tribunal has prioritized securing the Crown over fighting against the Reenactment.
There's no time to waste, Marseillaise. Take the Crown, and get as far away from Europa as you can.
...To be honest, I still don't trust Clemenceau one bit.
But, I'm willing to place my trust in you, Joffre.
From now on, I, the Fighting Angel, shall carry out this sacred duty.
May our paths cross again one day.
Yes, I'm sure they will. May the Iris bless you on your long journey.

sequence: Present Day
Somewhere in the Atlantic
Iris Libre Main Fleet

Exodus.say: Cardinal Richelieu, our recon planes will be approaching Saint Helena Island soon.
Good. Have the fleet keep its course and continue maintaining top speed.
Understood.
Le Terrible, give me a rundown of Saint Helena's defensive capabilities should it come under attack.
Let's see here... The Tribunal's secret fortress isn't located along the coast, but rather hidden inland within the mountains.
Unless it is attacked by a high-level Siren such as Purifier, it is unlikely to fall to conventional forces.
Your ability to launch a counteroffensive might be limited, but the stronghold itself can withstand a siege for quite some time.
Furthermore, even if a high-level enemy were to show up, it would be difficult for them to determine exactly where to attack.
Having all that said...
The primary purpose of this stronghold is to stay hidden. Even locating it in the first place is not meant to be easy.
(If the island's defenses really are that strong, there's a chance we can still make it in time...)
Cardinal Richelieu, we've located a Siren fleet in a fog bank up ahead.
It appears to be moving in the same direction as us. There's a possibility it's headed towards the same destination.
That must be it! The Sirens must be trying to attack Saint Helena!
They're probably bringing in reinforcements after realizing that the island's defenses are tougher than they bargained for...
But, the fact that they're sending reinforcements at all means that the island hasn't fallen yet!
Visual confirmation of humanoid Enforcer-type Sirens.
Let me check their models... I'm seeing two different types.
The two Enforcer XV models – Temptation and Restriction – as well as a mixed fleet of mass-produced ships.
Based on the information provided to us by the Eagle Union, those are the Enforcer models corresponding to Arbiter: The Devil XV.
(That's not good news. If Enforcers are already showing up, that means...)
Cardinal Richelieu, the Siren fleet has begun changing formations. They seem to have noticed us.
That leaves us with no choice, then.
Forward, Iris Fleet! Annihilate the Sirens!

sequence: >>RECEIVED: Buildup of Iron Blood forces near Iris Orthodoxy borders. Military action likely imminent.
>>SENT: Understood. Please keep monitoring the situation.
>>————————
>>RECEIVED: New intel shows that Iron Blood's spy network has entered a highly active state.
>>RECEIVED: Believed to be an intelligence-gathering operation in preparation for large-scale military action.
>>SENT: Understood. Please keep monitoring the situation.
>>————————
>>RECEIVED: Iron Blood is now confirmed to be planning a large-scale invasion. Please prepare defensive countermeasures.
>>SENT: The upper echelons have already begun preparing for war.
>>————————
>>RECEIVED: We've caught sensitive information containing the keywords: "Fall Gelb".
>>SENT: The Tribunal has deemed this intel highly credible. Please forward findings to the higher-ups.
>>RECEIVED: "Plan D" is underway. Expecting allied reinforcements to arrive in the near future.
>>SENT: Please continue to maintain strict confidentiality.

The Hidden Crown.say: Lady Richelieu, the enemy Siren forces have been completely wiped out!
Those Enforcers sure packed a punch though...
My recon planes have reached the Saint Helena airspace. I'll start scouting now.
I can only pray we're not too late...
Le Terrible, do you think the stronghold would be able to defend against those Enforcers we fought against earlier?
As long as the Sirens don't completely flatten the mountains on the island...
What if an Arbiter mainframe were to show up?
Unfortunately, it'd fall in a heartbeat if that were the case.
The Arbiters wield a completely different magnitude of power. They could vaporize the entire island at once.
Why would you think that an Arbiter could be here though?
We understand the Crown of the Holy See to be the symbol of the Iris Orthodoxy, but the Sirens would see it as they would any other object.
...You say that, but the reality is that an Arbiter's Enforcers have arrived.
We must make haste and rescue Marseillaise.
If we can get there first, we can minimize the perils that our colleague faces.

sequence: Years ago...
Somewhere in the Atlantic
Marseillaise's recollection

Sanctuary.say: Breaking away from the Reenactment warzone, Marseillaise glided across the ocean's surface.
As she continued onwards, she soon saw a mass of twisted, burning steel appear on the horizon.
I can't believe the Siren fleet made it this far...
Even this place isn't safe anymore...
If the Sirens have already pushed forward this much, we have no choice but to go westward.
There might be a suitable location on the African mainland...
The girl changed directions, and slowed down her speed into a cautious advance.
A signal had suddenly appeared on her radar, and was moving towards her.
What's the meaning of this...?
I'm glad to see that you're doing well still, Marseillaise.
You're... Le Terrible?
Is that really you? You're not a Pawn, are you?
I haven't heard from you since the Kébir Reenactment... I thought you had...
Sank on the battlefield, or scuttled myself?
Ugh... Sorry, it's been one tragedy after another these days...
In any case, I'm glad to see you alive and well. I certainly was not expecting that.
Indeed, the same goes for me. You could even say I was so happy I forgot to be surprised.
To tell you the truth, there's been a ton going on behind the scenes with the Tribunal.
Ever since Kébir?
Yep, the whoooole time.
I needed to remain undercover, so I wasn't able to reach out to you.
But, this isn't about me–
You're searching for a place to bunker down in, right?
Correct. This place isn't safe anymore, and I need to go further west.
Actually, I know just the place for you.
Are you going to take me to Cardinal Richelieu?
If that was your intention, then I can't–
Not quite.
I'd like to take you to Saint Helena, a secret Tribunal stronghold.
I assure you, it's the safest place you'll find.

sequence: Present day
Near Saint Helena Island
Iris Libre Main Fleet

Sanctuary.say: The peal of large-caliber cannons rang out in the waters surrounding Saint Helena.
Burning Siren wreckages littered the area, dyeing the otherwise placid scenery a smoldering red.
How awful...
The Sirens really are trying to flatten these mountains...
Béarn, how's the scouting going?
The Siren fleet has already captured most of the surrounding waters. Enforcers are also active in this area.
However, a small fraction of the island's autonomous defense systems are still online, which means that the interior facility likely hasn't been destroyed yet.
They weren't able to capture the entire area?
Correct. Their forces are not deployed in certain areas of the island, though I'm not sure why.
Are they trying to focus their attacks due to the sheer firepower of the defenses?
Nah, they're probably still reeling because we destroyed their reinforcements!
In any case, Lady Richelieu, let's get ready to land!
Wait, don't be in such a rush.
There's something not quite right about this island. You see it too, Le Terrible– I mean, Béarn?
This place... reeks of Infection.
"Infection?"
Yes, it reminds me of what I felt when I was purifying the basilicas on Kerguelen Island.
Sorry, but I'm not sure I understand you, Cardinal Richelieu.
I don't believe this area to be a Mirror Sea. At least, none of my equipment indicates anything to that extent.
Understood. I can't say for certain if it is the same phenomenon, but we should still prioritize repelling the Siren fleet all the same.
Le Terrible, is the Tribunal's secret channel still open?
Of course not. I already tried using it several times, but my message didn't go through.
There has to be another way of contacting Marseillaise.
(There's no way all these Siren wreckages were created just by the stronghold's defenses...)
(I fear that Marseillaise jumped into the fray herself...)
(Even though I stressed the importance of her safety, I couldn't get her to listen after all...)
(This is why battle freaks are so hard to deal with...)
We'll begin engaging the Sirens to draw their attention. Le Terrible, keep looking for a way to get us in touch with Marseillaise.
All ships, start moving towards the coordinates I just sent you! Draw the Sirens away from Saint Helena!
Huh? Isn't this place where the Sirens are most densely concentrated?
Yes. Look at it this way – if the Sirens don't want to deploy their forces somewhere, then we shouldn't either.
Be careful when you're fighting. I have a bad feeling about that "infected" area...

Aid.say: Present day - Saint Helena Island
KABOOM––!!
With a sudden explosion, two new figures burst onto the battlefield.
Ahahaha! That's more like it!
This is the kind of entertainment I've been craving!
Now, now, La Galissonnière. You know I haven't given the order to attack, right?
Ahaha~♪ Whoops, guess I got a bit carried away.
Algérie? And La Galissonnière?
Uhh, huh?
Aw, shit... Looks like our cover just got blown. Should we go over and talk to her?
I haven't seen the two of you since the Skybound Wall incident.
I'm glad to see that you're both doing well.
Likewise, Cardinal Richelieu. It's been quite a while since that battle.
And you seem to be doing just fine yourself.
What about me? I'm still as kick-ass as ever and, uhh...
Umm...
What's wrong, La Galissonnière? It's rare to see you at a loss for words.
C'mon, give me some credit here... Even I know how to read a room, sometimes!
More importantly... You... You're the real Le Terrible, right? I'm not just seeing things, right?
Real? Why wouldn't I be...
That really is you, isn't it? Where have you been this entire time?
When you suddenly disappeared... All this time, we could only assume the worst...
The awful rumors were everywhere. They were saying you had already sunk...
...Huh?
I have been pretty busy, but my whereabouts haven't been leaked after all this time?
You really had no idea where I was this entire time?
Of course not! You never reached out to any of us!
Well, yeah. The Tribunal gave me a secret mission.
That's my point exactly! I'm also a part of the Tribunal, so isn't it worse that you didn't contact your colleagues at all?
The Tribunal isn't a sports team, you know. Isn't it standard procedure to keep our work secret from one another?
Just like how I have no idea why the two of you are here right now.
So, let's hear it. What business do you have with us?
Uhhh...
Let's not worry about it then. More importantly, you can see the state Saint Helena Island is in right now.
Which brings me to my proposal: Let's not worry about internal politics right now, and join up to defeat the Sirens.
...What do you think, Algérie?
Le Terrible brought the Cardinal here for a reason, so she should be fully aware of whatever secrets are hidden here.
It doesn't do us any good to keep our cards too close to our chest at this point, right?
So here's the deal. We were sent by the Tribunal for two purposes: to go to Saint Helena Island to facilitate the retrieval of the Crown of the Holy See, and to escort Marseillaise back home.
I knew it... The same thing we were told.
(What are you up to, Clemenceau? Why give the same task to both Iris Libre and the Vichya Dominion?)
I see. In that case... We have no choice but to fight.
Perhaps not, Lady Algérie.
We both have the same objectives, no? To retrieve the Crown, and rescue Marseillaise.
Get to the point.
Hear me out – I'm not joking here. I actually just managed to locate Marseillaise.
...Hmm? But, why would she be there...
Béarn, hurry and send recon planes to the coordinates I just gave you!
Pay attention to the cliff areas in particular! We should be able to find Marseillaise there!
The cliffs...?
I don't know why she'd leave the secret stronghold and locate herself on such a conspicuous cliffside.
Wait, those coordinates... That's the area the Sirens seem to be avoiding on purpose, no?
Béarn, please be careful. We don't know what dangers we might encounter there.
Understood. I'll be in touch shortly, Cardinal.
Cardinal Richelieu, my recon planes have detected an anomalous situation.
It seems that your premonitions were right on the mark.
The area indicated by the coordinates is steeped in a black-and-red haze, similar to the Infection encountered on Kerguelen.
There also seems to be an enemy force inside the haze– Wait, it can't be...
There are unidentified enemies approaching from land, air, and sea! And Marseillaise seems to already be locked in combat with them!
Unidentified? Are they not Sirens?
That's correct... I can't identify their shapes at all through my planes' cameras... I've never seen anything like it before.
(An unidentified enemy... appearing alongside a strange haze...)
(Is that why Marseillaise decided to leave the stronghold?)
(In any case, if these enemies make their way into the mountains, we'll completely lose control over the situation.)
Le Terrible, do you know anything about these unidentified enemies?
My apologies, but I've never seen or heard of them before.
But it seems possible that the Sirens didn't deploy their troops here to avoid a confrontation with these... things.
What we do know, however, is that Marseillaise is in danger. Algérie, La Galissonnière, let's work out the details later. If we don't act now, we'll all fail our missions.
Richelieu, please bring the main fleet along and follow me.
...I see. I suppose rescuing Marseillaise is our top priority for now.
As long as you understand. Let's get going.
Very well. La Galissonnière, come with me.
Remember, we're fighting against an unknown foe. Don't take any unnecessary risks, and bring Marseillaise back safely!

sequence: Years ago...
Capital of the Iris Orthodoxy
Marseillaise's recollection

The Day the Holy City Burned.say: The Iris Orthodoxy's shining Holy City was consumed by the flames of conflict.
Its intricate, ornate roads once welcomed back heroes returning from magnificent victories...
But now, upon them rumbled the cold, heartless engines of war.
The gruesome sight of the burning Holy City would soon spread to every corner of the world through every conceivable form of communication.
So in the end, all she chose to do was watch from the balcony...
Not just the Tribunal, but even the Templar Knights as well...
Then, I am left with no other choice.
Both the Tribunal and the Templar Knights knew. They both made this decision.
I am the Fighting Angel of the Iris Orthodoxy, and her chief executor. It is not my place to question the orders I have been given.
Even if I am told to lay down my arms, even if I am told to watch our Holy City burn.
Even if the Iris Orthodoxy is to be split in two.
It is not my place, because all I can do is fight.
I know nothing but the Holy Iris' teachings. I cannot say anything.
It is not my place, because I am but a ship, a vessel of war...
Then, I am left with no other choice.
But still, there has to be something I can do.
If I allow myself to be struck down here, if I don't climb back up... how can I be worthy of the title of Fighting Angel?
As long as the Iris Orthodoxy needs me, I will...
I will...
Fight, continue to fight, and never back down––

sequence: Present day
Waters near Saint Helena Island

The Day the Holy City Burned.say: Richelieu struggled to push through the waters choked with the black-and-red haze, alone.
What in the world... is this haze?!
The deeper in I go, the more it pushes back against me, like a wall of some sort...
At this rate, I'm not going to be able to breathe...
I... My body's starting to give out on me!
KABOOM––!!
She mustered her strength, discharging her cannons in a desperate attempt to blow away the haze. However, it quickly flooded back into the area.
Again and again, I fought. Again and again, I failed.
What you are doing now is futile. Utterly meaningless.
Give up, sister.
Jean... Bart...?
No, you're not Jean Bart at all!
She would never say something like that!
This is just an illusion... Just like the Infection back in the basilica's facility...
Calm down, Richelieu... Don't let your emotions get the better of you...
Calm down, you say?
Shouldn't you be angry, if anything?
You abandoned your friends, your sister, and even the Iris Orthodoxy...
You've been gritting your teeth, enduring it all until now. But for what? What have you achieved?
Endless ridicule, scorn, slander, and abuse... Nothing else.
So why calm down?
Don't say another word! Please...
KABOOM––!!
Hmph. Now, you finally understand.
Yeah, that's right. Look into the light! Let the wrath flow through you!
Shut... your... mouth!
A black sun, quietly burning in the dusky sky.
Please, give me strength... Give me the strength to dispel this illusion!
In the blink of an eye, the black sun disappeared from her consciousness.
Her mind snapped back to the middle of the ominous haze.
But, this time...
*pant*... *pant*... I'm finally... free from the illusion...
That overwhelming, crushing aura I felt just now... is also gone...
Just like it had once before, the banner in her hand shimmered with countless specks of light.
The light is gradually converging on my banner just as before... Have my prayers been answered?
Has my faith been made manifest?
...I see, so this must be a core component of the Iris Orthodoxy's facilities.
Not just the basilica itself, but the entire idea of conceptual manifestation...
If the Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse were a physical application of that phenomenon, then the black sun–
...Clemenceau, what have you done?!
KABOOM––!!
The sound of distant cannonfire interrupted her thoughts.
Marseillaise and the others are still fighting out there!
As long as I can wield this power, I have to save everyone!
But, I swear that I will get my answers – about the Tribunal, no, about the Iris' Sacraments.
I swear... that I will lead the Iris Orthodoxy into the future.

sequence: Years ago...
Saint Helena Island - Secret Tribunal Stronghold
Marseillaise's recollection

Going Solo.say: So here we are, Marseillaise. The place I told you about.
Incredible. When did we excavate such a massive facility deep inside the mountains?
I've never seen any allocations being made for a project of this scale... How many outside channels would the Tribunal have needed to go through?
And how did it secure the permissions and funding to construct something like this?
Extraordinary circumstances call for extraordinary measures. Is that not why the Tribunal keeps spare change lying around?
I'm not overly concerned about the specifics.
Setting aside the motivations of the higher-ups, the Tribunal has always been a shadowy organization. It's only natural that they have secrets they don't want the general public to know.
The Naval HQ has always been wary of the power held by the Tribunal.
With this, I can see why they've thought that.
Goodness, Marseillaise. Is it really the right time to nip at the hand that feeds you?
In any case, you are now the master of this estate. The Tribunal's secret stronghold is in your hands.
Remember the sacred order given to you – protect the Crown of the Holy See.
You're not going to stand guard here with me?
Unfortunately, I have no shortage of work to attend to.
There are too many other areas that require my attention, so...
Yes, while I am certainly loathe to leave you on your lonesome, this is also the Holy Iris' will. We both have been given our respective duties.
I will be back sometime later to check on you, so bear with it until then.
Understood. I, the Fighting Angel of the Iris Orthodoxy, swear to protect this Crown with my life.
...Well, we did say before that the Crown is just an object.
It's not worth losing your life over. Remember, if at any point, you are forced to choose between it and your life, I want you to choose the latter without hesitation.
...The Iris Orthodoxy has already had to make too many sacrifices.

sequence: Present day
Waters near Saint Helena Island

Going Solo.say: The haze continued to spread until it even blotted out the moonlight.
The formless mass of black and red writhed and extended outwards, as if it had a will of its own.
If one listened closely, it almost seemed like there was a distant howl drifting along the wind.
I knew this day would come...
Agents of evil who would seek to snatch the Crown... Conceal your appearances as much you like, but you cannot hide your vile intent.
You stand on hallowed ground, a bastion that protects our Sacraments from the enemies of the Iris Orthodoxy.
Even if you have torn through the boundary of possibility to invade this place, it is my honor to stand unflinching against you.
My apologies, Le Terrible.
I am the fighting angel of the Iris Orthodoxy. To do battle is my purpose.
If I am forced to choose between my life and the Crown, I will always choose the Crown without hesitation.
No matter what kind of situation I find myself in, no matter what kind of enemy I face.
You shall not lay a finger upon the Sacrament of the Crown!
Demons and heretics that would seek to sully what is sacred––
In the glorious name of the Holy Iris, I shall destroy you!
长剑闪烁着刺目的圣洁之光。
The angel's pure, unyielding will to protect manifested itself into power, pushing the formless foes back again and again.
But, the enemy's numbers were limitless.
And she had already pushed herself beyond her limits. Little by little, the girl was cornered into a cliff overlooking the ocean.
One more step would push her not into the sea's embrace, but rather the embrace of defeat. At last, she had nowhere left to go.
So this... is how it ends...
Just at that time, she saw a glimmer of light from beyond the haze that choked her vision.
That light... that voice... Is that you, Cardinal Richelieu?
But, why are you here...?
No, now's not the time to think about that... I must keep fighting on!
Having found hope once more, the girl once again lifted her sword, the radiance from the blade parting the mist for a brief moment.
As fleeting as it was, that moment was enough to clearly reveal Richelieu, approaching with her glistening banner held high.
Cardinal! I hereby entrust the Crown to you!
Please, you must ensure the Crown's safety!!
With the last of her might, Marseillaise threw the Crown towards the holy light.
As soon as the Crown left her hand, the girl was swallowed up by the surging haze and disappeared within its depths.

sequence: >>Our forces have been defeated.
>>The frontlines have collapsed, and the Iron Blood army now advances at full speed.
>>Sardegna has also joined the battle, making the situation even worse.
>>At the orders of the Naval HQ, all troops have been withdrawn from the capital.
>>We are now completely defenseless.
>>I have told the shipgirls to obey this order, so that they may conserve their strength.
>>Additionally, our intel network has entered a latent state and is preparing for long-term warfare.
>>The Templar Knights' shipgirls have been dispersed to various locations and transferred under the command of Jean Bart.
>>But, a number of the Tribunal's ships will continue to act independently and not take orders from the Naval HQ.
>>In the event of conflicting orders, the Tribunal's orders will take precedence over the Naval HQ's.
>>The Cardinal plans to leave the Iris Orthodoxy and temporarily evacuate under the guise of a diplomatic visit to the Royal Navy.
>>...If the arrival of the antediluvial flood is inevitable, then wise is she who prepares the Ark.

Coffin of the Holy Crown.say: After Marseillaise passed on that which she dedicated her life to protecting, the world she perceived around her began to crumble.
Her vision was dyed a swirling mass of black and red, her ears rang with a writhing, squelching sound. Her wavering consciousness was swallowed up by the hazy darkness.
What... a terrible... noise...
But, it'll... all be quiet soon.
Soon... everything... will disappear...
Her eyes started to slowly close, letting her consciousness fade into nothingness.
But just before absolute silence fell, she heard a familiar yet distant voice in her ears.
Don't... let go... Hold on... to your consciousness...
You can't... give up...
Please, don't give up!
A light cut through the endless darkness, like a beacon leading her back to her senses.
...Light?
「于地狱之中涌现的邪恶。」
I, Cardinal Richelieu of the Iris Orthodoxy, hereby declare–
You stand upon hallowed ground, a sanctuary of the Holy Iris.
This land is steeped in the blessings of the most Divine.
Therefore, your ilk shall not be permitted to run amok here.
Ashes to ashes, dust to dust.
By the radiance of my holy banner, I will burn you away from existence!
The writhing presence screeched as it faded away and disappeared, like fog dispelled by the light of dawn.
As the haze cleared, so too did the ominous aura clawing at the shipgirls there.
Marseillaise slowly climbed to her feet and surveyed her surroundings.
It appears you've been able to repel the enemy, Cardinal Richelieu.
But... something still doesn't seem quite right.
Marseillaise! Are you alright? Are you able to stand?
Cardinal... The Crown of the Holy See...
...I'm sorry, Marseillaise. The Crown... was taken away.
How could this be...
The gnawing feeling of loneliness, the bitterness of defeat, and the damage she had sustained in battle all rushed in at once.
Combined with the devastating news that just struck her, Marseillaise was overwhelmed and lost consciousness.
Rest well, my friend. Your efforts will not be in vain.
Not long afterwards, the rest of the Sirens were defeated, and Marseillaise was transferred to a safe location.
The Crown of the Holy See had disappeared without a trace.
Just like the black and red haze, and the unidentifiable enemy writhing within it.
Only the scarred cliffs, pummeled by intense cannonfire, quietly stood as testimony to the fierce fighting that had broken out there.

sequence: Present day - Saint Helena Island
Secret Tribunal Stronghold
Iris-Vichya Joint Fleet

To Retrieve the Crown.say: I gotta say, the Tribunal sure knows how to build a sturdy fort.
The outside looks like it's been through hell and back, but you'd never be able to tell at all from the inside.
You talk too much. There's an injured person here, you know.
Oh, uhh, whoopsies...
Are ya still sulking, Marseillaise?
...No. I don't sulk.
You totally ARE sulking! But... I can imagine how frustrating it must be for you right now.
...It has nothing to do with you.
...But, it probably has everything to do with me. You're mad at me, aren't you?
Oh, you're back, Cardinal~
Is everything holding up okay out there?
We're just finishing up putting out the fires, and there aren't any signs of Siren reinforcements.
They must've realized that the Crown is no longer here.
...We let them get what they came here for.
If only you didn't try to save me back then, and instead protected the Crown––
That just means, I chose you over the Crown of the Holy See.
If I had just picked up the Crown and ran away, I could have made it out. But you, on the other hand...
I am the fighting angel of the Iris Orthodoxy. It was my sacred duty to protect the Crown, even if it cost me my life.
I'm not throwing your life away... Just like I'm not going to leave behind any of the Iris Orthodoxy's children ever again.
This is the choice that I made. Not the Crown, but the life of my friend, Marseillaise.
I am sorry for trampling over your convictions.
But, no matter how many times I am confronted with this choice, I will make the same decision every time.
Even if the Crown is a symbol of the Iris Orthodoxy's legitimacy, I will not sacrifice my friends for it.
Cardinal Richelieu... I simply can't understand you after all...
Marseillaise seemed to have more to say, but instead closed her eyes and remained silent.
Please rest well for now, Marseillaise.
Waters near Saint Helena Island
Richelieu, I believe this is where we bid each other farewell.
Hmm? Algérie?
I wasn't able to secure the Crown, so there's no point in staying around any longer.
I now have to go back and consult with Clemenceau to see what our next course of action is.
As for Marseillaise... I trust she's in capable hands.
Algérie... Even now, you're not willing to come with us?
We each have our own goals and perspectives, Richelieu. Let's just leave it at that.
Not so fast. Stay put, both of you.
As an acting agent of the Iris Libre Navy, I hereby announce the following to La Galissonnière and Algérie of the Vichya Dominion Navy.
You have trespassed in an Iris Libre facility without authorization, and have engaged in suspicious activities against the Iris Libre fleet.
You are to stop right now and surrender yourselves, or I have no choice but to forcefully detain you.
Legal talk aside, I have you completely surrounded. Come with me quietly.
...Haha, for a moment there, I forgot about that whole Iris Libre and Vichya thing~
It felt a bit too natural for us to team up and fight together, you know. Hrmmm...
Algérie, I don't like our odds right now. Are you gonna get mad at me if I surrender?
C'mon, we weren't able to retrieve the Crown. Even if we go back, what are we supposed to say to Clemenceau?
She said that failure wouldn't be tolerated, right? But she didn't say anything about surrender.
So this is what you've been gunning for all along? I must say, I'm rather unimpressed.
In the end, you know that there's no way I can just throw my hands up and turn myself in.
...I'm just as surprised as you are, though I'm sure you're not going to believe me.
But, Algérie, I want you to know this.
Iris Libre and the Vichya Dominion are two parts of one whole. Everything I've done is for the sake of restoring the one Iris Orthodoxy.
No matter what trials await me, no matter how hard I have to try, my resolve will not waver.
I will never give in, not until the Iris Orthodoxy is made whole once more.
I'm sure that Clemenceau and the Tribunal, Jean Bart and the Templar Knights... all feel the same way.
Indeed, we have fought against each other as enemies. But, only because we chose different paths towards the same destination.
Thanks to everyone's efforts, we have protected our Sacraments, made our basilicas secure, and defended the safety of our waters.
We've already shown that we can work hand in hand towards the same goal, so what reason is there for us to remain split?
Deep down, you already know the answer, don't you?
The flames of old hatreds have been extinguished. Former enemies now fight side-by-side, and the World Expo has shown that there is more that unites us than separates us.
Even though the progress may seem slow, the world is moving forward, step by step.
Of course, there will always be those who benefit from Iris Libre and the Vichya Dominion remaining divided.
But, we cannot let them drive a wedge between us.
We must continue to stride forward, and not dwell upon the mistakes of the past.
Algérie, I know that you're not simply "following orders" from the higher-ups.
You know full well that we must usher in the Iris Orthodoxy's future, and never let it be swept away by sinister undercurrents.
Richelieu...
I implore you, Algérie, please fight with us once more.
If I defect, Clemenceau will–
I know that girl well. She knows how to take care of herself.
Besides, it won't be long until we can go visit her, with all our Vichya friends as one.
However, if you still need more time to consider, feel free to use the facility here at Saint Helena "forever."
Though, we'll be breathing down your neck the whole time, so I'm sure you won't enjoy those arrangements.
In any case, I've said what I needed to say.
Just think about how nice it would be to once again fight under the banner of the Iris Orthodoxy, and not have to worry about petty factions.
Hah... I have no other choice then.
I suppose getting threatened and getting a sweetheart deal cancel each other out.
Having all that said though, Richelieu, don't let your idealism get the better of you. You can't erase the scars of the past, or pretend none of it ever happened.
I know. That's why we will create a new path forward.
Step bravely into a brighter tomorrow, rather than waiting for yesterday's darkness to dissipate, huh?
Welcome home, Algérie.

The Chase.say: Saint Helena Island - Inside the Tribunal Facility
After an eventful night, the ships gathered in the Tribunal facility decided on their next course of action.
We should prioritize locating and recapturing the Crown of the Holy See.
Even if it is symbolic in nature, we mustn't let it fall into the wrong hands.
As I said before, it has little intrinsic value on its own, but I do share Marseillaise's sentiments.
Without the Crown in hand, you might find a number of things more difficult to accomplish, Cardinal Richelieu.
More importantly, we cannot ignore the new enemy that attacked us and snatched it away.
Indeed. The reasons you've provided are sound, and I also see the importance in recapturing it.
However, I am more worried about the Sirens and this new unknown enemy than the Crown itself.
How did they manage to locate the secret facility housing it, and what were they planning to do with it?
Finally, what is the relationship between the Arbiters, Infection, and the mysterious enemy? We must find the answers to these questions as soon as possible.
Say, do you mind if I head back to the Tribunal for now?
I mean, nobody knows what happened here yesterday except us, right?
I can just walk in like nothing happened and be a totally badass spy, then use the Tribunal's extensive intel network to search for leads.
Risky, but a potentially rewarding option. What do you think, Richelieu?
That's true. I might be able to get a glimpse into the workings of the Naval HQ, as well as how things are faring back in the Iris Orthodoxy homeland...
We're all on the same page then? In that case, I'm gonna get ready to head back! Man, being a double agent is gonna be sooooo much fun!
Oh, right. Before you go, let me give you a bit more information about this secret stronghold.
The Crown wasn't the only thing special about Saint Helena Island.
There are a number of important Tribunal assets stored here, and I expect them to come into play sooner rather than later...
Who knows? You might even find something that you can use to your benefit.
But, there's a lot of ground to cover, so you may find it in your best interest to remain here a while longer.
Ehh? Don't we have a whole bunch of people here already? Do you absolutely need me to stay as well?
Wouldn't it be better for us to spread out and get as much info as we can?
Sure, if you're fine with the possibility of getting your cover blown without anyone to bail you out.
...Hmm, you do have a point.
I'm not saying you have to stay here forever. Just know that if we can fully secure this facility for ourselves, we'll be able to use it as our base of operations.
In the meantime, I think we've all earned ourselves some time to rest and recuperate.
In other words, let's not get too ahead of ourselves right now.
I'm not opposed to you returning to the Tribunal, but let's follow Le Terrible's suggestions first.
Good. So, can we all agree on that plan?
Ah, yes. One last thing. La Galissonnière, do you still have that "medicine" from the Tribunal?
Cardinal Richelieu, the nightmares you've been seeing may be related to one of the basilica's mechanisms.
Wait, there's medication for my nightmares...?
It's just speculation on my part, but the nightmares began since you were exposed to the basilicas in Kerguelen, right?
A number of the Tribunal's people sent to work in and around the facilities reported a number of strange symptoms, so they started issuing these to alleviate some of the side effects.
Gimme a sec. I think I happen to have some on me...
La Galissonnière dug around and retrieved a tightly-sealed phial with liquid inside of it.
Huh, I never really connected the dots before, but this much should do the trick. Here, give it a try.
Make that two. Leave one here for me as well.
Huh...?
Something wrong?
La Galissonnièr pondered for a moment, but decided not to question it. She fetched a second phial, and placed it on the table next to Le Terrible.
Thank you very much.
Now onto the next topic of interest, Cardinal Richelieu––

sequence: Record of a past broadcast–
>>I have asked the enemy to cease all acts of aggression.
>>It brings me no pleasure to make this decision, but there is no other choice.
>>Some will feel numbness in their hearts when they hear these words.
>>Perhaps it is relief, perhaps it is paralysis caused by the harshness of reality.
>>Some may see this act as despicable, but it will be worth it in the end.
>>Some will be outraged, and some will grieve.
>>Some may feel wrath rise up within them, and direct it at the person who made this decision.
>>Let that anger become fertile soil for resistance to take root, and take the first step towards victory.
>>The Iris Orthodoxy's battle is over.
>>But, my battle has only just begun–
現在　サディア主催・世界博覧会
……とは別のサディア某所。

災の進行時.say: 静寂に包まれる大広間。蝋燭の火のみが寂しげにほのかな光を放っている。
床に落とされた影は弱々しく、嵐の訪れに怯える小枝のように揺れ続けている。
……兆しが現れた
……陰る雲が開き
……地を明るく照らす、聖なる光
……大いなる存在がついに降り立つ
……輝しき栄光に満ちた、かの写し身
そこまで！相変わらず意味がわからないけど
要するに、「大いなる存在」の化身とやらがついに現れるわけね？
よろしいっ！掴んだ情報が正しかったってことよ
おーほっほっほっほ！
このマルコ・ポーロ、もうどれだけ待ちわびたことか！
威光を広める偉業、そのための最後のピースがついに揃った！
さあ、大いなる存在――ずばり「神」よ
「全ての願いを叶えられる」のよね？
あははは！おーほっほっほっほ！
大笑いをしながら、マルコ・ポーロは寂れた聖堂を後にした。
大きく開かれた扉から吹き込んだ風が、最後のろうそくの火を消した。
……そして再び雲が陰り
……世界は偽りの光に包まれる
……それが「神」が作り出した、永遠なる虚偽の楽園――

災の進行時.say: 現在　自由アイリス主力艦隊
聖堂の封印後、アイリスに帰還中のリシュリューは夢を見ていた。
…………またこの夢……
……ジャン・バール、そこにいますか？
マルセイエーズ……？！
……危険な状況……？
リシュリュー枢機卿？
リシュリュー枢機卿殿～～？
大丈夫ですか？枢機卿殿？
……うん……頭がちょっと重くて……
すみません、つい寝入ってしまいました
大丈夫ですよ。それよりテリブル、何か用？
実は大事な報告があります
審判廷の……クレマンソー様からの連絡を頂きましてね
「機は熟した。そろそろアイリスの正統を取り戻す時だ」
……わかりました
あまり動じないご様子ですね
「聖座の冠」はアイリスの正統の象徴……しかし、象徴は象徴にすぎません
信ずる者たちからの信義があって初めて、己を正統たらしめるものになります
とはいえ、この連絡は無意味なものではありません
審判廷が冠の情報をこちらに伝えてきたことは、流れが変わっている証明でしょう
「聖座の冠」に通ずる鍵…はマルタにあります
そっちに向かいましょうか
それには及びません。枢機卿殿
聖堂の島での枢機卿様のご活躍により事情が変わりまして。「冠」の在り処に直行できますよ
そうなんですか？
セントヘレナ島です。審判廷は以前ロイヤルの許可のもと、とある秘密要塞を建設してましてね
「冠」はそこで軽巡洋艦マルセイエーズによって守られています
マルセイエーズ……？
はい。公の場にほとんど出てきませんが、審判廷の戦闘天使は「再現」の後からずっと「冠」を守っていたようです
テリブル、正直この手の話はあまり信じたくありませんが…
この数日見せ続けられた夢に、そのマルセイエーズが出てきました
黒い太陽の夢……ですか？
確かにそれは凶兆と捉えても仕方がありませんね…
テリブル。「冠」はともかく、マルセイエーズは放っておけません。私たちは――
（クレマンソー殿はこの展開を予想して連絡してきたのですね…）
（あの要塞は常時電波封止状態でしたね――ふぅ。全く、私に勝るとも劣らない性悪な方です）
艦隊の針路を変えて、セントヘレナ島に向かいましょう

sequence: 過去　「再現」の戦場　EP2
ヴィシア聖座・施設内
審判廷所属、戦闘天使マルセイエーズ

エクソダス.say: 普段は騒がしい指揮施設の中だが、静まり返っていた。
通信機が報ずる「再現」の戦場から、戦艦ジャン・バールの声のみが鳴り響く。
「敵対していないにも関わらず、アズールレーンから攻撃された時点で、既に答えは見えていた！」
「そんな偽善者どもに、オレたちは絶対に従わない！」
「ヴィシア聖座は今存亡の危機に直面している――」
「我々の周りには敵だらけだ。…だからどうした！」
「命令を下す！全艦、直ちに自沈せよ！」
翼の有無に関わらず、審判廷所属の艦船たちは珍しく不安に襲われていた。
命令と希望、矜持とプライド、そしてフネ…ヒトとしての想いが交錯する。
（栄光あるヴィシア聖座の護教騎士団が……これで………）
（上層部が発した鉄血の軍勢はすでに侵攻してきています）
（「再現」がなされた…これからはどうすれば……）
（アイリスを守るには、私は一体なにをすれば……）
己の未来に思いを馳せるマルセイエーズだが、ふと誰かに声をかけられた。
マルセイエーズ。ここにいましたか
この施設はもう安全ではありません。ついてきてください
ジョッフル？私は……
私はどこにも行きません
「再現」がなされました。聖座もじきに誰かに支配されるでしょう
アズールレーンにしても、鉄血にしても同じです
審判廷とてこの事態に巻き込まれずにいることは叶わないでしょう…
（都市を無防備にすれば、セイレーンとの戦いもままならないです）
……ところでジョッフル、行くとはどこへ？
審判廷の計らいで「冠」の移送が決まりました
あとはここから避難して、戦力の温存を――
逃げる……ですか？アイリスの聖裁を司る審判廷が、戦わずして逃げるなんて…
ジョッフル、私はこの「再現」を見届けなければなりません
戦闘天使として私は戦場にて散るべきです
私のことは構わず、あなたが先に避難してください
誰も「逃げる」なんて言っていませんが？
「聖座の冠」とはアイリスの正統の象徴――それを認めるヒトさえいれば効力があります
そしてマルセイエーズ、「冠」を守る聖命はあなたにしかできません
「冠」は……そこまで価値のあるものなのでしょうか？
たしかにそれを認めるヒトがいれば「冠」を狙う存在が出てくるでしょうが…だからって…
それに、なぜこの話が「審判廷」から……？
…審判廷は護教騎士団と違って暗部の組織だからでしょう
あなたもそう言ったように、「冠」を狙う存在が出てくるのは自明です
ゆえに、その「冠」を悪しき者から守るのもアイリスの戦闘天使たる私たちの聖命です
わかり…ました。マルセイエーズ、「聖座の冠」守護の聖命を拝命いたします
神聖なるアイリスの御意志を遂行するために――
これはアイリスの意志ではなく、アイリスを奉じる我々ヒトの意志です
鉄血の進軍速度は非常に速く、この状況で考えられる上層部の狙いは一つだけ
――「アイリスの解体」です
なので、審判廷としては「再現」の対応よりも「冠」の確保を優先しました
さあ、迷っている時間はありません。マルセイエーズ、「冠」を持ってここから脱出しましょう
……正直クレマンソーのことはあまり信頼していませんが…
ジョッフル、あなたの言葉は信用できます
戦闘天使マルセイエーズ、これより聖命の遂行を行います
願わくば…いつかまた会いましょう
ええ。また会いましょう。あなたの旅路にアイリスの覚悟があらんことを

アイリス艦隊、前進！セイレーンを撃滅します！

すぐに落ちてしまいますね。残念ながら
アビータ本体の戦力でしたら、山を削るどころか島ごと更地にできるでしょう
しかし、なぜアビータがこんな場所に？
「聖座の冠」はアイリス正統の象徴と言われますけど、セイレーンにとってはただの物にすぎないですね
……いずれにしても、現にエンフォーサーが現れたのです
今は急いで島に向かってマルセイエーズを救出しましょう
私達が先に到着できれば、仲間が危険な状況に巻き込まれずに済みますから

sequence: 過去　戦場　EP3
大洋の某所
艦船・マルセイエーズ

サンクチュアリ.say: 「再現」の戦場から脱出し、マルセイエーズは大洋を疾駆する。
そのまま進んでいくと、水平線の向こうから、燃え盛る鋼鉄の廃墟が現れた。
セイレーンの艦隊がここまで……
かなり航行したはずなのに、まだセイレーンに出くわすなんて
この航路も安全じゃなくなりますね。となると、西に進むしかません
南方大陸なら安全な場所も――
方向を切り替えて、マルセイエーズはゆっくりと警戒しながらスピードを落とす。
気づけば一人の艦船が彼女に向けて近づいてきていた。
無事みたいですね。マルセイエーズ殿
あなたは……ル・テリブル？
「駒」じゃなくて…本物のテリブルですか！？
ケビールでの「再現」以降、あなたからの消息がなくて、私はてっきり……
戦場でやられたか、自沈したか…そう思われてもしょうがありませんね
ええ……すみません。あまりにも悪い話が多くて…
とにかく、無事でよかったです。まさかここで会えるなんて
私も。驚かすのを忘れるぐらいには嬉しかったのですよ。ふふふ
実はまあ、審判廷のところで色々動いてましてね
ケビールの時からずっと…？
そんなところですね。ずっと
行方をくらましたという体になっていたから、みんなとなかなか連絡が取れなくて
まあ、そんな私の話より――
ジョッフルとはぐれて、避難先を探し求めているようですね？
はい。この海域はもはや安全じゃありません。私はこのまま西へと――
それでしたら、うってつけの場所を知っていますよ
もしかして、リシュリュー枢機卿様のところですか？
それでしたら――
残念ですが違います
セントヘレナ島、審判廷の秘密要塞。あそこなら安全です
一緒に行きましょう

sequence: 現在
セントヘレナ島周辺海域
自由アイリス主力艦隊

サンクチュアリ.say: 島の周辺で、巨砲の轟音があちこちから鳴り響く。
静かな海はすでにセイレーンの砲火によって赤く燃え上がっていた。
ひどい…………
セイレーン…本当に山を削る気ね……
ベアルン、偵察機の様子は？
セイレーン艦隊はすでに周辺海域のほとんどを支配しております。エンフォーサーも確認できました
ただ、島の自動防御施設も少数ながら生きています。中の施設もおそらくまだ破壊されていないでしょう
完全包囲していなかったのですか？
はい。原因は不明ですが、島の周辺の一部には戦力を配置していないです
戦力を集中しているから、一時的に陣形が崩れているのでしょうか…？
違うよピーちゃん！きっとそこに配置された艦隊はわたしたちが倒したんだよ！
うん！リシュリュー様、そこから島に上陸しましょう！
待ってください。焦ってはなりません
島の様子がちょっとおかしい…テリブル、いいえ、ベアルン
「汚染」の痕跡は確認できますか？
「汚染」、ですか？
はい、聖堂の島「ケルゲレン」で「駒」の汚染現象に遭遇した時と同じ気配を感じます
恐れ入りますがリシュリュー様。私めはなにも
ここは鏡面海域ではありませんから、もしかしたら私めの持っている設備では検知できないだけかもしれませんが
……わかりました。いずれにしてもセイレーン艦隊を撃退しませんと
テリブル、審判廷の秘密回線はまだ使えますか？
無理ですね。さっきから何回も呼びかけましたが返事がありません
マルセイエーズ殿の位置を特定するなら、ほかにも手があるはずです
（この残骸の数……要塞の無人防御兵器によるものではないですね）
（おそらくマルセイエーズ殿が要塞から打って出たのでしょう）
（むぅ、あれだけ気をつけてって言ったのに結局聞いてくれなかったと）
（全く、これだから戦闘バカは……）
テリブルがマルセイエーズを捜索している間は、私たちでセイレーンを引き付けましょう
全艦、これより送った座標に向けて進撃を開始し、セイレーンをセントヘレナ島から引き離しましょう！
ん？セイレーン艦隊が密集しているところを攻撃するの？
ええ。セイレーンが配置されていない部分は罠の可能性が高いですから
（あの方角から不吉な気配がします…戦闘中でも少し気を配りましょう）

回帰.say: 現在　セントヘレナ島
砲撃とともに外から新たに二人、戦場に乱入してきた。
そうだよ！それでいいじゃない！
あははは！たーのしー！！
……もうガリソニエール、攻撃開始の指示はまだでしょ？
あはは♪ごめんごめん、つい
アルジェリー？！ガリソニエールも…？！
あ、あれ？
しまった…今の攻撃でリシュリューにバレちゃった……大人しく会いに行こ？
神穹の一件以来ですね。アルジェリー、ガリソニエール
二人が無事で何よりです
ええ。こちらこそ。枢機卿様とは随分と久しぶりね
そちらも無事で何よりよ
私も多分久しぶり……かな？
ガリソニエールが静かになるなんて、珍しいものを見れましたね
それは時と場合によるって……え！
テリブルじゃない！？本物のテリブルなのよね？？
本物の……？
ほらあなたさあ、色々なところに行ったりしてたじゃない！
しかも急にながーく消えたりして…もう、心配かけるんだから…
テリブルがどこかの海域で倒れたって噂があったくらいよ？
うーん、確かにあちこち行ったりはしていましたけど…
さすがに行方不明扱いするのは酷くありません？
そりゃあなたが連絡なかなかよこさないからでしょ！
一応秘密任務に参加している身なので……
それよ！秘密任務だからって仲間に全然連絡しないほうが酷いもん！
審判廷はみんなそうだと勘違いした私が悪いみたいですね
まあ、それでも秘密行動は仕方ありませんよ？私だって二人がなぜここにいるのかは知りませんから
そ・れ・で？二人は何をしに来ましたか？
うーん…………
まあ、枢機卿殿が言うのもなんですし、代わりに私から提案しましょう
この状況ですから、聖座云々の話は置いといて、まずはセイレーンを一緒に倒すのはどうでしょう？
……アルジェリーはどう思う？
テリブルが枢機卿をここに案内したから、もうこの島の秘密を知っているはず
私たちがいつまでも無理に隠していてもしょうがないじゃない？
実は審判廷から依頼があったの。仲間を助けて、「冠」を回収しアイリス本土に移送するってね
やっぱり…私たちと同じですね
（しかし妙ですね…クレマンソーはなぜ同じ情報をアイリスとヴィシア両方に…？）
なるほど…じゃあやっぱり一戦交えるしかないみたいね
それは違いますよ、アルジェリー殿
マルセイエーズ殿の救出、そして「冠」の回収、お互いの目的は同じじゃありませんか？
と、こうしている間に実はマルセイエーズの居場所を見つけましてね
……ん？なぜあんな場所に……
ベアルン殿、偵察機を今送った座標に飛ばしてください！
崖を重点的に調べてください！マルセイエーズは多分そこにいます！
なぜ秘密要塞から出て、見つかりやすい海崖に出たのかはよくわかりませんが…
（座標の場所はセイレーンが兵力を配置していない場所に近い…？）
ベアルン、気をつけて飛ばしてください
かしこまりました。枢機卿様
枢機卿様、偵察機が妙な状況を発見しました
…枢機卿様の予感が見事に的中したようです
座標の区域は赤聖堂の島での「汚染」と同じく、黒色の靄に覆われています
中には敵性存在の影も確認されていて――これは…？！
正体不明の敵性存在が複数確認できました！マルセイエーズが交戦中のようです！
正体不明？セイレーンではないのですか？
はい、敵の姿はその――偵察機の目では形状、武装を含めて全く見分けが付きません……
（靄の中にいる正体不明の敵……）
（あれがマルセイエーズが要塞から打って出た理由……？）
（海ではなく山間部まで進出されては確かに手が負えない）
テリブル、あの正体不明の敵についてなにか手がかりはありますか？
ありません。あんなの聞いたことすらありませんね
もしかしたらセイレーンはあれと接触するのを避けるために兵力を配置しなかったのかもしれません
このままではマルセイエーズが危険です。アルジェリー殿、ガリソニエール、悪いけど一緒に来てもらいましょう
リシュリュー殿は主力艦隊を率いてついてきてください
……そうね。マルセイエーズの救出が最優先ね
そういうことです。出発しましょう！
ええ。ガリソニエール、私たちも行くわ
仲間は最優先で…みんな、気をつけてください。すぐ追いつきます！

sequence: 過去　EP1
アイリス聖都
艦船・マルセイエーズ

聖都燃ゆる日.say: 輝けるアイリスの聖都は戦乱の火に包まれていた。
贅の限りを尽くされ、華麗に舗装された道はかつて偉大なる勝利を記念するために使われていたが――
今や、それは無情なる戦争の祝勝パレードの行進路として用いられていた。
燃ゆる聖都の凄惨な姿はじきに文字で、写真で、あらゆる伝達手段によって世界中に広まっていく。
観閲台にいるのは……っ……
審判廷のみならず、護教騎士団まで……
こうするしか…ないのですね
騎士団も審判廷も、それを分かっていて決断しました
軽巡マルセイエーズ、アイリスの戦闘天使として、決断された結果には抗えません
たとえ戦闘を止め、燃え上がる聖都をただ見続けるだけだとしても
たとえアイリスが、ヴィシアと二分されることを座して待つことになったとしても
戦闘しか知らない私には何もできません
アイリスの教えしか知らない私には何も言えません
フネである私には、何も………
まだ、できることがあるはずです
倒れるのも、諦めるのも…戦闘天使マルセイエーズには相応しくないです
アイリスが私を必要としている限り、私は……
マルセイエーズは……
逃げずに戦い続けます――

sequence: 現在
セントヘレナ島・周辺海域

聖都燃ゆる日.say: 赤黒い靄に包まれる海の中、リシュリューはたった一人で先へと進もうとしていた。
この靄…一体……何なんですか…？！
先に進むほど、壁のように押し寄せて塞がってきて……
このままでは呼吸も……っ
力が…入らなくなって………っ！
砲撃を放ち、かき消そうとしてみたものの、靄はすぐさま元に戻ってしまう。
抗っては負ける。それも一度ならず何度も
お前が今やっていることは全くの無意味だ
もう諦めろ。姉さん
ジャン……バール……？
違う……あなたはジャン・バールなんかじゃありません！
ジャン・バールならこんなことを言うはずがありません…！
あれは幻…聖堂施設にある「汚染」と同じ……
冷静になって、リシュリュー……冷静に…惑わされないように……
冷静、だと？
むしろ怒るべきだろ？
お前は仲間も、妹も、アイリスも見捨てた
今まで散々我慢してきた。努力してきた。だが結果はどうだった？何を得られた？
終わることのない嘲り、蔑み、貶め、罵り……それだけだ
お前はどうして「冷静」でいられるんだ？
……それ以上言わないでください…！
ふん。ようやく分かってきたじゃないか
そうだ。その感覚だ！自分の怒りを噛みしめてみろ！
もう黙って……！！！
昏黄の空に静かに燃え続けている黒い太陽――
どうか私に導きを…この幻に……打ち勝つ力を……っ！
目の前にある禍々しい虚像が一瞬で消え去った。
意識が元に戻り、リシュリューは戦旗を強く握り直した。
どうやら靄に入ったとき、自分は幻像に襲われたようだ。
はぁ…はぁ……幻は…消えましたね…
そしてさっき感じました重苦しい空気も……
ケビール島の聖堂施設の時と同じように、リシュリューの旗に無数の光が集まっていることに気づく。
祈りを捧げれば、心象が反映され「概念」として現れます
そして今、私が確かにあの幻の中で祈っていました……
………やっぱり審判廷の聖堂にはこの仕掛けが共通してあるのですね
いいえ、聖堂だけでなく、もっと広い範囲での「概念」による攻撃…
それを物理的に応用したのが「黙示録の四騎士」でしたら、今のは……
クレマンソー…あなたは一体何をしたのですか……！
遠くから響く砲撃の轟音がリシュリューの思考を中断させた。
マルセイエーズ、みんなまだ戦っています……！
この力がまだ残っている限り、みんなを助けないと……
審判廷、いいえ、アイリスの秘蹟――いつか絶対にちゃんと説明してもらいます
アイリスを未来に導くためにも…絶対に

sequence: 過去　EP4
セントヘレナ島・審判廷秘密要塞
艦船・マルセイエーズ

逃避行.say: これで一通り案内し終わりました。マルセイエーズ殿
まさかこんな巨大な空洞を掘削したなんて……
認可と主導をするのは上層部、審判廷だと聞きましたが
ロイヤルはどうしてここに要塞を建設することを許可したのでしょう…？
審判廷のポケットマネー……と言っても流石に無理がありますよね
そこは私も存じ上げません
上層部の狙いはともかく、審判廷も秘密主義に徹した組織ですし、ヒトに知られたくない秘密がたくさんあってもしょうがないです
審判廷の上層部での評判はよく知っています
この施設を見る限り、あながち間違いではないですね
マルセイエーズ殿、今はそんなことを言っている場合ですか？
とにかく、この審判廷の秘密要塞は任せました
そして「聖座の冠」の守護の聖命も、です
…テリブルは私と一緒にここを守るわけではないのですか？
残念ですが、ほかにもやることがいっぱいありましてね
調べることも、見届けることも、まあ色々ありますので
マルセイエーズ殿を一人にさせるのは忍びませんが、これもアイリスのご意志。そして任された務めのうちです
そう遠くないうちにまた来ますので、今はどうかしばらく我慢してください
はい。戦闘天使マルセイエーズ、命をかけてアイリスの冠をお守りします
まあ、お仰る通り「冠」はあくまでただの物ですから
命をかけてなどと言わずに、いつか守るべきものとの選択に迫られた時は、迷わず命を選んでほしいものです
……アイリスの犠牲はもう十分ですから

sequence: 現在
セントヘレナ島・周辺海域

逃避行.say: 広がっていく靄はやがて月の光すら遮った。
まるで意志を有するかのように、名状しがたき赤黒は蠢き続ける。
耳を澄ませていれば、どこからともなく風と共に嘶きの声が聞こえる。
やはり来ましたね。冠を奪わんとする邪悪なる存在
たとえ姿を隠せても、その悪しき意思の牙と爪は隠せていません
ここは審判廷の要塞、アイリスに仇なす怨敵を防ぐ盾にして、アイリスの秘蹟を守る尊き聖所
防壁も通り抜けた敵が相手なら、引きこもらず立ち向かって戦うことが栄光ある行動と言えましょう
テリブル…ごめんなさい
私はアイリスの天使、戦うために生まれたもの
守ると誓った「冠」、それと自らの命から一つしか選べないというのなら、迷うことなく「冠」を選びます
形なきものが相手でも、孤軍奮闘するしかない状況でも
「冠」の秘蹟に決して触れさせはしない！
神聖を汚そうとする魑魅魍魎――
輝かしきアイリスの名にかけて、あなたたちを討滅します！
长剑闪烁着刺目的圣洁之光。
守ると誓った純潔なる意志は天使の力となり、無形の悪意を何度も押し返した。
されど敵の数は無限。
己の限界をとっくに超えたにも関わらず、少女は少しずつ海崖に追い詰められていった。
一歩先は海ならぬ、敗北の深淵。ついに彼女の最期が訪れた。
………ここまで……か…っ…
その時、視界を覆う禍々しい赤黒い靄の彼方から小さな光が見えた。
あの光……あの声は……リシュリュー枢機卿殿…？
なぜ、あの方がここに……？
いいえ、今は考えることより……戦うのが先！
希望を見出した天使は再び剣を掲げ、放たれた輝きは一瞬だけ靄を晴らした。
光の中で、戦旗を手にするリシュリューの姿がはっきりと見えた。
枢機卿殿、「冠」はそちらに預けます！
どうか、「冠」を受け取ってください…！！
聖なる光に向けて、「冠」を全力で投げる。
手から離れたその瞬間、少女の姿は再びに靄に飲み込まれた――

>>抵抗は虚しく、鉄血の軍が奥深くまで侵入してきた。

>>上層部の指示により、聖都の防御が解除される。
>>いわば「無防備状態」
>>艦船たちは所定の計画に従い、戦力温存に務める。
>>情報機構を含めた各部署は潜伏態勢に入り、持久体制に移行する。
>>護教騎士団の艦船はジャン・バールの指揮の元で各地に分散し
>>審判廷の艦船に関しては、上層部の命令を受けず独自行動可能とする。
>>上層部の命令と矛盾する場合、審判廷の命令を優先するように。
>>枢機卿殿はアイリスから離れ、ロイヤルへの訪問と偽って一次避難させる予定。
